title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Marco, Unknown person #5, Apoo, Unknown person #6, Chopper, Unknown person #7 as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UH! So annoying!! to be on the sidelines of the battlefield!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't involve me in your squables!! Do whatever you want!!

dialogue.speaker: Marco
dialogue.text: Marco!! If you want to kill me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do it some other time!! I dont have any SOULS to use against you right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We'll take care of this guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Help me!! I'll turn into a demon!!

dialogue.speaker: Apoo
dialogue.text: Sir Apoo!! We are Allies, aren't we?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I give it to you, I'll be killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: THERE'S MUR- DEROUS INTENT EVERYWHERE I LOOK!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please! Give me the Antibody!! I don't wanna die!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hang in there! We'll get the anti- body for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAIT!! Stop!! Two on one IS A BIT TOO MUCH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to back-up kin'emon and the others!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Fighting you will only waste my time!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 32 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
